entry.title: Is it possible to have two different settings within a single goal plan?
entry.content: We have a goal plan that includes the "GM_MLT_BASED_RATING_CALCULATOR," which generates scores based on the MLT table. The MLT table is manually set by the employee during the goal-setting stage. The current requirement is to have some goals with a fixed MLT table that should be pre-populated. Is it possible to have two different settings within a single goal plan? If so, can we configure the goal plan to include a pre-set MLT table without any predefined range or formula, while still allowing the employee to make edits if necessary?

entry.title: Re: SAP PO FILE adapter additional file not keeping origi...
entry.content:
SOLVED:

error was in order of modules in adapter with correcter order like this everything is working as intended

entry.title: Re: Can I use workforce in SAP DM without integration to...
entry.content: thanks, I thought Schedule Labor 2.0 is a newer version of the Schedule Labor app but it contains a very different functionality. the Schedule Labor app seems to have sufficient functionality

entry.title: Re: Error Message no. CJ055 'PEP element is already imput...
entry.content:
Hi @Javier_del-Peso 

Thanks for your response but our elements are only in 'Created' status without other objects assigned

It seem to me like an issue in standard app.

Regards,

entry.title: Ariba SLP - How to Stop ERP Sync in progress
entry.content: We are facing an issue when we try to Sync from Ariba SLP to ERP.  The Request out message goes correctly but the confirmation does not return back.  Please advise how to stop the Sync in progress to repeat.

entry.title: Re: BW Hierarchies and Flattening in BW via ABAP
entry.content:
Hi renish,

I am interested in the Hierarchies of your part 2, the Set Hierarchies.

I looked to the links of Bindu Priya but I could not find any information on how to extract Hierarchy-Sets from a S4 System. 

Do you have any information how this works, also with CDS Views?

Thank you and best regards

Fabian

entry.title: Re: Why is Hungarian Notation Harmful?
entry.content: I cannot believe, in our team, how much time has been wasted enforcing stupid HN. At the end of the day, SAP is to blame, as the naming of variables this way was promoted in their documentation. But it adds zero value. The "I need to see what kind of variable this is" argument holds no water. If you struggle to read or understand code because it does not have HN then, I am sorry, the problem is not with the code, buddy.

entry.title: Re: How to read Table AB in Payroll run to idetify special situations
entry.content: Hello sikindar_a, thank you very much for your tip. But if I only look at the sum TKAU**, then I don't know whether this value was present on the 1st of the month. Here only a sum is formed over the whole month or the part of the month (according to WPBP). But I need to know whether certain counting classes are present on the 1st of the month. THANK YOU Thomas

entry.title: Re: Is Abap a "case sensitive" language or not?
entry.content: I apologize, I didn't notice. Thank you

entry.title: C4C Opportunity Report with 2 time characteristics
entry.content:
Hello,

I need to create a report in which a manager can monitor (high level) all opportunities of his whole team on a monthly basis.

In one report view he wants to see per month:

  1. The number of opportunities created
  2. The number of opportunities won
  3. Transformation rate of 1 and 2
  4. The expected value of the opporutunities created
  5. The value of the opportunities won
  6. Transformation rate of 4 and 5

Point 1 - 4 do not cause any challenge. I created some additional counters to calculate the rate correctly as it has to be on a monthly bases and not overall.

It is point 5 and 6 that cause challenge. Because the first 4 items can be base on the Opportnity Year Month Creation on date but the last 2 are based on the Close Date (that is set when the status is put to won). The challenge is that a part of the key figures is based on the creation date (Year Month Created On) and that the opportunities won are based on the close date (Close Date).

The two date elements do not seem to be able to go together in the same report. My question is how to achieve the situation where both dates can be used in one overall report and a neutral selection can be made on month year - so that indicates what happened last month in terms of creation and closure.

(no use to reply with all kinds of standard reports that can be used alongside - those reports i all know. The question is how to combine the time characteristics and maybe create another one in just one report).

Thanks a lot for your feedback.

MJ

entry.title: Re: Is Abap a "case sensitive" language or not?
entry.content: I didn't realize I wrote tilde (~) or dash (-) differently. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Is Abap a "case sensitive" language or not?
entry.content: @Tomas_Buryanek can you explain why accessing struct member via ~ (tilde) is wrong (independently on case)?

entry.title: Re: 固定资产数量调整
entry.content: Hi , Currently there is no existing APP can process mass asset quantity adjustment. You can use the API below for your requirement. 当前没有现有 APP 可以处理批量资产数量调整。 您可以使用以下 API 来满足需求。 https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/5bcca49998834de2b5533c36602e52a2/0bb55e6d8c6a4353afc20d3542cbc508.html?locale=en-US&q=Post+Quantity+Adjustment Br, Bob

entry.title: Error in SMQ2 "Item 000010: No sales quantity is saved for item"
entry.content:
Dears,

We are getting below error in SMQ2 "Item 000010: No sales quantity is saved for item" during OBD replication from S/4HANA to EWM (Embedded). This is happening only in out Test system. Production system doesn't have such issue. Most SAP notes and discussion refers to Qty offset profiles as possible fix, but when I cross check profiles in both systems (Test & Production) they match perfectly.

What could be the alternative fix then Qty offset profile to check?

It is also important to mentioned, that we recently made a copy of Production system into Test system. Issue appears after that, hence problem may comes from some of copied customizing from Legacy system (RFC connections or something else). Any ideas, which one to check?

entry.title: Re: Plant specific email output
entry.content: hello, I would like to add to Mohanish and advise the usage of Vendor Subranges (in the role FLVN01 Supplier > purchasing data) where you can specify OA and GS by plant.

entry.title: Incorrect calculation in the Cost Component split in 12 Currency Type
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,
We have one issue with Material Ledger where we need your support. There is an incorrect calculation in the Cost Component split in 12 Currency Type in our system.
The main issue is that the Cost Component split in ‘12’ Currency Type is not equal to ‘10’ Currency Type. To be clear, in our solution we activated ‘12’ Currency Type just in case. We don’t use Profit Center Accounting and according to Blueprint, the sums in ‘12’ Currency Type has to be equal to ‘10’ Currency Type. 
We investigated that case by ourselves and found out that the difference were calculated due to PP-order Settlement. 
 
For the first sight, the reason is that the system calls functional module ‘CKMO_GET_ORD_HIST_MLCCS’ for ‘10’ Currency Type, and it’s not the same as for ‘12’. The systems calls functional module ‘MLCCS_KSTAR_TO_KSTEL’ for ‘12’ Currency Type.

As a result the cost in ‘12’ Currency Type calculated according to their own principles and not equal to ‘10’ Currency Type. PP-order has absolutely the same amounts in ‘10’ and ‘12’ currency during the period. There are no additional FI documents posted to change the sums in ‘12’ Currency type. Actually after analysis we can confirm that there are no reasons the sums in Cost Component splitting in ‘10’ and ‘12’ Currency Types to be not equal. But we see the opposite situation in the system.

Our question is what the reason that the sums in 10 and 12 Currency types are not equal in that case?

entry.title: Re: Is Abap a "case sensitive" language or not?
entry.content: thank you 🙂

El

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP nodeJS .drafts undefined

Hi @T1mey  

I see no options to access service entities through cds unfortunately.
One can only access db entities, but there is no drafts in that layer.

Maybe if somehow you can access the service module in your delegate, and use serviceModule.entites?

Regards,
Peter

entry.title: Re: Solution Manager7.2- Project Management (Phase Type)

entry.title: Re: Is Abap a "case sensitive" language or not?
entry.content: @radinator ~ (tilde) is "Column selector" you can read a bit of ABAP documentation to find more details about it 🙂 Link: https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_latest_index_htm/latest/en-US/index.htm?file=abentable_comp_selector_glosry.htm

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM - Guided Implementation App - How are T...
entry.content:
Hi,

The "in-app help" in the Guided Implementation app clarifies its use case and which Tasks are displayed:
"What's this app?
In the Guided Implementation app, you can get an overview of all the tasks in your project grouped by phases."

The in-app help also lists a series of actions that you can perform in the app, including changing Task statuses, etc.

Thanks and regards, 
John

entry.title: Re: SLD Data Supplier to to SAP's Support Backbone, for A...
entry.content:
Good Morning,

Thanks Vera for your answer.

I know that I can perform manual update of my systems to SAP Support Backbone.
But this is useless human resources consumption.

Switching to a new technology which is SAP Cloud ALM, should not bring us to prehistoric technology.
By prehistoric technology, I mean that Solman automates the LMDB pushes to SAP Support backbone.
Therefore SAP should provide the same automatic mechanism if case of Solman to ALM migration.

Have a nice day.

entry.title: Invoicing Plan Monthly Value Calculation
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I would like to understand how to set up an invoicing plan in the purchase order advanced app.

I aim to test the following scenario:

  • The invoicing plan has a start and end date spanning one year.
  • The monthly value for each item line should be 1,000 SGD, with a total net value of 12,000 SGD.

However, the system is currently displaying 12,000 SGD for each item line instead of 1,000 SGD per month.

Could you please assist with resolving this issue?

Best regards,

Khaing

#SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Re: Key User Custom Fields in Fiori UIs based on SEGW OData Services: How to control field propertie
entry.content:
Hi!

Thanks for the post.
But for first 4 ' other related blogs' access denied (tried under different users):

entry.title: Re: ABAP Clean Core for Unreleased Function Module
entry.content:
If you are logged on via HTTP, there is no need to use function module CREATE_RFC_REENTRANCE_TICKET, you can simply make a GET request to the ICF service /sap/public/myssocntl.

Note that in older systems for this to work, the above ICF service needs to be active (I think, since Kernel 6.40 it is by default) and the profile parameter login/create_sso2_ticket needs to have the appropriate value. See documentation of that profile parameter in RZ11.

In newer systems (7.54 and newer) it should work out of the box. See note 2822156 for details.

entry.title: Re: Labelling length of dimensions in the bar chart
entry.content: Do you have another idea? Or who can help me?

entry.title: Update ACDOCP table from ABAP options
entry.content:
Hi,

As part of custom developments, I need to update the plan data in ACDOCP table from a custom application.

I found one api Financial Planning Data - Write (https://api.sap.com/api/API_FINPLANNINGDATA_SRV/overview). Is it the right way to update the ACDOCP table using this api or do we have any standard class or FM available in on-premise system?

Any guidance on this topic is really appreciated. Thank you.

entry.content:
Hello,

We are facing error in Lockbox. The lockbox file got imported successfully with status Unprocessed for one line item. The item is giving error message FA 006 - Payment advice 123456789 does not exist for account 87654 9999 when trying to Edit Payment Advice. Kindly assist how can this be resolved? Is there a way to unlink payment advice from this lockbox line item or delete the payment advice number displayed in error message because the payment advice is not visible in AVIK / AVIP tables.

entry.title: Re: Use the Alert Service now across Multiple Plants
entry.content:
Hello Frank,

Thanks for the sharing! This is very helpful to understand the alert services in SAP DM.

I want to consultant you here with 1 question:

If i want to use a custom Alert Schema in an alert type also need to fillin data while create this alert by refer to this custom alert type.

Can i process the followings?

1. Create an alert schema;

2. Add it in the new created alert type;

3. Add the new created alert schema into the createAlertRequest? -> is it possible?

4. Create PPD to call create alert service?-> will this API use the new createAlertRequest structure?

Best regards,

Eason

entry.title: Re: Make fields editable based on Login user.
entry.content:
Hi @Pyae_Phyo_Thwe 

please have a look at the Custom Fields in S/4HANA: How to control field properties like mandatory, read-only, and visibility blog by @georg_wilhelm. This blog provides links to other blogs covering the different types of custom fields and applications, how to find out if field extensibility or field control is supported at all, and how to implement field control.

Best regards
Kai

entry.title: Re: EPMDimensionOverrideRange
entry.content:
Ok what am I doing wrong here. I've tried two approaches

1) Green cell on the screenshot. This method works and the report refreshes instantly.

=EPMDimensionOverride("000","PROFITCENTRE","BAS("&F2&"),BAS("&F3&")")

2) Orange cell on the screenshot. Trying to use the range method and linking it to two additional columns in the table which add the BAS onto the members in column F.

'=EPMDimensionOverrideRange("000","PROFITCENTRE",Table1[Manual Dimension Override List for Range])

and in the table helper column to get base ="BAS("&[@[Manual Dimension Override list]]&")"

Using method 2 gives me no errors but the report just hangs on "Sheet1: Restoring Excel Calculation..." and stays there for at least 15 mins when I've just given up and force closed excel.

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: SF - How to consider several time entries individually with the same time type per day

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements app deployment failure to backend
entry.content: We resolved the issue with executing the following tools from SUI_SUPPORT: - Calculation of SAPUI5 Application Index - Update Caching of OData Metadata - Delete cached OData Metadata - Repair App Index Error Flag But it is probably sufficient to recalculate the app index (/UI5/APP_INDEX_RECALCULATE) to solve the problem.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Clean Core for Unreleased Function Module
entry.content: Please be informed that 'ACO_PROXY' works only for RFC enabled FMs.

entry.title: Temporary Product Cannibalization for Promotional Items Using SAP IBP PLM
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I’m a Junior Consultant currently working on a client requirement involving temporary product cannibalization within the Manage Product Lifecycle (PLM) app in SAP Integrated Business Planning (IBP). Despite exploring the app's functionalities, I’ve encountered challenges implementing a solution and would greatly appreciate insights or guidance from this community.

The Requirement

The client wants to implement a temporary cannibalization scenario for promotional items in their product lifecycle management. Here’s the specific use case:

  1. Promotional Period (April 2025 to August 2025):

    • The new product (promotional item) should receive 80% of the forecast, derived from the history of the reference product.
    • The reference product should retain 20% of the forecast during this period.
    • The total forecast (new + reference product) must always sum to 100%.

  2. Post-Promotional Period (After August 2025):

    • The forecast values should gradually adjust:
      • The new product reduces to 20%.
      • The reference product increases to 80%.
    • Both products remain active, with neither product phasing out.

What I’ve Tried

In SAP IBP PLM, I’ve tested several approaches, including:

  • Assignments and phase-in/phase-out settings to control forecast distribution.
  • Forecast curve adjustments to simulate a gradual transition of forecast shares.
  • Time-dependent attribute transformations to temporarily shift forecast values between products.

Despite these efforts, I haven’t been able to configure a solution that meets the client’s requirements for a temporary cannibalization scenario.

Current Workaround

As an ad-hoc solution, I’ve implemented a manual attribute transformation to achieve the desired forecast split during the promotional period. While this approach works, it is:

  • Inefficient and time-consuming, especially for large-scale implementations.
  • Difficult to maintain for recurring scenarios or when adjustments are needed.

Context and Challenges

In SAP IBP PLM, the Manage Product Lifecycle app is designed to support phase-in and phase-out processes for product introductions and discontinuations. However, the flexibility for temporary cannibalization—where two products coexist with dynamically adjusted forecast shares—is not explicitly supported in the standard functionality.

Additionally, the client’s requirement for gradual forecast transitions after the promotional period further complicates the setup, as PLM primarily focuses on lifecycle stages rather than dynamic period-based forecast distribution.

What I’m Looking For

I’d like to know if anyone has successfully configured a temporary cannibalization process within SAP IBP PLM or has insights on how to address the following:

  1. Distributing forecast shares between a new and a reference product for a defined time period without phasing out the reference product.
  2. Simulating gradual forecast transitions post-promotion using PLM configurations or other IBP tools.
  3. Avoiding reliance on manual attribute transformations to streamline the process and ensure scalability.

Question

How can the Manage Product Lifecycle (PLM) app in SAP IBP be leveraged to handle this use case? Are there any best practices, configurations, or workarounds you would recommend for managing temporary product cannibalization scenarios?

Thank you for your insights and support!

Best regards,
Kacper Benner

entry.title: SQL Anywhere 17 Read-only scale-out: how does the root server choose copy node?
entry.content:
I am setting up SQL Anywhere 17 Read-only scale-out system. I have a question about this sentence in the docs: "You can choose to have the application connect to the copy node that is least heavily loaded using the NodeType=COPY connection parameter".

I would like to know as precisely as possible how the root server chooses which copy node to connect to, i. e. how does the root server know which copy node is least heavily loaded at that moment?

Thanks.

entry.title: Compensation - Update compensation forms
entry.content:
Hello

Greetings !

We have a daily scheduled job to update the employee history and run bonus calculation & update launched forms.

Whenever a new hire comes or if there is a future hire in EC, the employee history is getting updated successfully but the new eligible employees are not getting added to the form.

We are able to add new employees via scheduling "Variable pay mass update job" in provisioning  but, there are no employee data present in the form because we are not calculating bonus payout anywhere in this process 

Now ,If we go and calculate bonus payout manually and update forms again then only the new eligible employee bonus data is getting updated in the form but, there is no provisioning job for calculating bonus payout of all forms so that we can automate this overall process

Can you let us know that do we have any way to achieve this.

Thankyou


SAP SuccessFactors Compensation 

@xavierlegarrec

entry.title: Re: Advanced Log Space Management (ALSM) as of Db2 for LUW Version 11.5
entry.content:
Dear @Frank-Martin @Db2Dirk 
thanks for having this thread and for keeping it updated.

Until now we have not activated ALSM, although it would have been helpful in the past. We have concerns regarding the required free space in log_dir, and we're happy (used to) with the system as-is.

Now I've read with Db2 12.1 ALSM will be active by default.

What is your recommendation in regard to ALSM & Db2 parameters before we upgrade to Db2 12.1?

  • Do we need to change Db2 parameters like MAX_LOG, NUM_LOG_SPAN, or any other parameter?
  • Do we have to re-evaluate LOGPRIMARY, LOGSECOND (which we like to avoid), LOGFILSIZ?
  • Currently, for example, the system is happy with 150GB primary logs and a 180GB log_dir disk so we are below our monitoring threshold of 90% disk usage (and we have some buffer in case our backup infrastructure is being maintained). How much free space in log_dir do we have to have on hand once ALSM is active?

Regards

Michael

entry.title: Re: SAP Inside Track Barcelona 2024 Recap
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing, @david_ruizb! Great crowd and so many familiar faces.

I also love the many sponsors you got for your event. It's awesome to see how many companies are agreeing to support. They see the value of these events, and that is great! I can only say: congratulations on a successful SAP Inside Track again 😊

entry.title: Re: Issue while accessing the Ariba application in BTP wo...
entry.content:
Your issue may be due to various factors, so try these troubleshooting steps:

- Ensure network settings and firewall rules permit the connection between BTP workzone and Ariba application.
- Confirm the URL for accessing the Ariba application in BTP workzone is correct.
- Check if Ariba application is properly configured for BTP workzone.
- Verify correct credentials and user permissions for accessing Ariba application in BTP workzone.
- Look for error messages or warnings in the logs.

entry.title: Re: SF - How to consider several time entries individually with the same time type per day
entry.content: Hi Volker - Happy to give some more information regarding my question. Business case would be that the employee uses the time type "official errand" (e.g. the employee has to peform a task for his work before he actually starts his work at the office) from 07:00 - 08:00. At the office he registers time type "work" from 08:00 - 16:00 and after that he registers again the time type "official errand" from 16:00 - 17:30. Business policy states that only after 30 minutes the time registered with time type "official errand" is evaluated as "working time". As I have two time paires with the time type "official errand" I am not able to consider them individually.

entry.title: Re: Why is S/4HANA suddenly unable to log in? HANA has al...
entry.content:
Your user account might be locked due to multiple incorrect login attempts or your password might have expired. SAP systems often have a password policy that requires users to change their passwords periodically.

Did you check, if there might be a system issue, such as a network problem or a server downtime?

To reset your password, you would typically need to contact your system administrator. They should have the necessary privileges to reset your password or unlock your account. If you are the system administrator, you can reset the password through the SAP HANA Studio or SAP HANA Cockpit.

Here are the steps to reset a password in SAP HANA Studio:

1. Open SAP HANA Studio.
2. In the Systems view, find the system for which you want to reset the password.
3. Right-click the system and select "Reset Password".
4. Enter the new password and confirm it.

The exact steps might vary depending on your SAP HANA version and system configuration. Always ensure to follow your organization's security policies when resetting passwords!

entry.title: Re: Loading Time by Crane to be displayed on Order confirmation and Delivery confirmation (outbound)
entry.content:
Hi ,

Now Business is asking just to create new Service Material with base of Unit in Minutes.Here they will enter total time required against new service item with Total Tonne of loading done.Time will be entered manually and this service item should then reflect on Delivery note with total Tonnage of loading.My query will be :

1.Can we achieve this by creating new service item in MM01 ?

2.Can we create new condition in VK11 for crane loading and link to service item category ?

3.An special adjustments do we need to do in output determination ?

entry.title: Re: Post credit memo to transferred fixed asset
entry.content:

Can you please check configuration depreciation level the check box select "neg value allowed" or

At asset master and depreciation level as well and Go to Asset master/ Depreciation area/click on your depreciation area and select "neg value allowed" check box

entry.title: Re: SAP BW 7.5 migration to new box
entry.content:
Hi Ratish,

1. still can't migrate transports from BW 7.0 to BW 7.5, right? Yes, You can't migrate from the lower to the higher version of transport two different version of BW systems.

2. We mandatorily need to upgrade the existing Bw 7.0 to 7.5, right? yes, during the process you have to check the SAP PAM existing SAP BW 7.0 version SP level supported latest Windows server 2019 along with MS SQL 2019.

3. Is it possible to share the current SAP BW 7.0 version details? 

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: Post credit memo to transferred fixed asset
entry.content: Hi, we do not want negative value, as explained the acquisition is 200 000€ and the credit memo is -100€. It should not become negative. Thank you

entry.title: Re: how to add multiple report in one report during run time
entry.content: Hi As i mentioned below i have found the solution, i am giving the details about the solution. I am using ITextSharp library to get the result.

entry.title: Re: Is Hungarian Notation as bad as "everyone" says it is? They are wrong!!! (oops clickba
entry.content:
Hello @ABAPMarty 

as a preface this is a highly subjective reponse that I wrote from my PoV. I have no Intention of applying this to all the other SAP/ABAP devs out there. So take any opinion based Statement I make with a grain of salt.

That out of the way: Before I was ABAP-ing I did a lot of C#-ing, there I did not use HN at all. My variables were a mix of camel case and upper camel case (depending on how I felt). This wasn't an issue since my work was done on IBM RPG3, which allowed for only 6 chars per variable name, and ILE RPG, allowing more but I still used short form just for comfort. I did not even consider snake case or HN at all because it seemed weird to me to use avg_price, lv_avg_price or lv_avgPrice instead of avgPrice.

When I switched to programming in ABAP I overtook the HN style from some tutorials I worked through I was confused at first because the first 2 letter followed by the underscore did not mean anything to me. Over time this changed and I whole-heartedly fell in love with this way of naming, while my coworker was used to name everything wa_, regardless of scope or sometimes even type (table or struct, was all named wa_).

In the context of programming in General I describe myself as experienced in Terms of "I've done it for >10 years" now but I would never put myself up to people that worked in the industry for the same amount of time. Simply because I did projects in my free time with "modern languages" and worked in an old environment for work. And in my eyes I can't compare those two.

Reading the article about HN made me happy again, because (even after using HN for a few years now) it still felt a bit awkward to me, especially when working on my private projects at home - where I sometimes take over the use of HN. Where I, then, have a mix of HN and non-HN code. Seeing someone writing about abolishing HN allowed me to see the world in the way I saw it when I did C#: Using real-world names instead of (maybe too much) abbrevations and having the to decode the first 2 letter and instead looking at the variable and instantly knowing where it belongs.

Spoiler
Ok to my shame I have to admit that *some* C# Projects had underscore as a prefix to indicate private variables, which were also "global scope" (yea I know it's not the correct term but I was using 1 class per file so more like "global" in the context of the class). But I digress.

Speaking of HN for the distinction between local and global scope, using HN solves this issue and creates a new one: The need for consistent naming rules (convention). As Michael_B explained in his original post: Using pefixes can be ambiguous if done wrong. Yea a simple local table with lt and Input variable iv works perfectly, but what do you do with local reference vs local object. Or do you use a t_ for type defs? If not, what's the best replacement?

In the olden days you had limited amount of space for your variable names so using shortened forms made sense and helped a lot. Then we (as the devs) got more than 6 letter per variable but still had the problem of naming things (one of the 3 biggest issue in IT next to Cache Invalidation and off-by-1 errors *wink*). So someone invented HN to allow the programmer to deligate the mental load of remembering the scope of avariable down to it's naming. Having a system that enables you to write code and another - with proper adaptation - to understand it, is key to good work in general IMO. You can't build big software if the communication in code is bad. And for each evolution step there were programmers, stuck in that past, that refused to move on based on opinions like "the new System is bad because X, Y and Z" (trust me, I had the discussion (and pretty sure a bunch of other devs had this too) with my way older coworker).

Spoiler
Side Tangent:
If SE38 had the same visual aid as other editors like VS Community/Code (different Icons for global vs local variables) we would not Need HN at all. Especially since (and this is one of the more opinion based Statement in my post) the only Need for HN is the fact that without lt_ or gt_ you would not know if it's a local or global variable unless you double click and jump to the Definition. Especially with larger sized function that include tons and tons of SQL Statements *caugh* Clean Code *caugh*.
Side Tangent 2:
I would also wish for SE38 to have better color coding of parameter names when calling functions and a better autocompletion. Since calling a function and the popup window disappearing so I now have to click away, click to the function and hit ctrl+space again is annoying.
Side Tangent(s) over.

I tried to list a few reasons pro and contra HN just to have a list positives (+) and negatives (-) of things to debate over:
Objectively:
➖HN is cluttering the code with double letter plus underscore and therfore means
➖having to type more than neceesary ("l t underscore ctrl+space scroll trough the variables instead of just ctrl+space and scroll)
but
➕ makes the scope visible at first glance and allowes a
➕separation of variables by scope and type via prefix
On the subjective side we have
➖ different coding styles between work and private stuff can be annoying
➖ using HN with inconsistent coding styles in your Company unless you get all on board leads to messy code base
➖additional mental overload when calling SAP functionalities because you have to swap from non-HN (from my/your code) to the HN style
but
➕ with time you get used to it and enjoy the easyness of prefixing and accessing variable names

I don't have a perfect solution for this either. I can only decide for myself which way I want to go. In the end I am a bit torn apart between seeing the advantages of HN and also seeing the downsides. I will try not using HN (because it doesn't matter for me, I face no consequence if I change my coding style or not) and will comment on Michael_B's post in a few months to report on how it affected me personally and how it is going for me (anecdotal evidence at it's best)

tl;dr Both of you are Right in their own regards. HN is objectivly not better than not using it. And hating on HN with (at best) weak Arguments isn't the Right way either.

entry.title: posting of reversal noted item
entry.content: if we reverse noted item entry generated without line item due to this whenever we see noted document we can see the noted item with reversal item instead of line items due to this there is total showin in fbl1n is there any solution whenever we see noted item in fbl1n in GL. There should positive and negative value should be appreard

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One licensing schema
entry.content:
When using SAP Business One for HANA in a virtualization environment with disaster recovery (e.g., VMware SRM), the hardware key is tied to the specific hardware of the server. As I know, activating a secondary server will generate a different hardware key, as it is bound to that specific system.

For disaster recovery scenarios, SAP allows the use of temporary license keys on the secondary server. These temporary keys enable system functionality during failover periods but are tied to the hardware of the secondary server.


For more information:

https://help.sap.com/doc/e3c6258407504233aeec4d2cffa3a73a/9.2/en-US/B1H_Components_HA_Guide.pdf

entry.title: Re: OUT NOW: SAP Signavio November 2024 release
entry.content: Hi @Tobias_Mache1 the integration has been delayed to Dec 12. More information will be available after this date!

entry.title: Re: Is Hungarian Notation as bad as "everyone" says it is? They are wrong!!! (oops clickba
entry.content:
I agree that some points against HN are not very strong and bulletproof. So it is hard to use them in team debates when trying to recommend drop HN.

Maybe we can think about some stronger points? Or it will be never ending discussion 😁

entry.title: Re: SKU: 8017496 (SAP HANA, EE Cloud, upgrade, private ed...
entry.content:
The SKU 8017496 refers to an upgrade for SAP HANA Enterprise Edition (EE) in the private cloud. It upgrades HANA use rights for S/4HANA Enterprise Management, providing additional features or capabilities.

The Data Provisioning Agent (DP Agent) is included and supports data integration, while XSA (Extended Services Advanced) is available upon request for advanced application development. This SKU is typically part of a Bill of Materials (BOM) for customers upgrading their SAP HANA system.

entry.title: Re: Consume Level Based Hierarchy from HANA View in WEBI
entry.content: Web Intelligence does not directly support level-based hierarchies from HANA views.

entry.title: Reading Freight order header and item texts in Custom BTP Adobe Forms in S4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

We are trying to develop custom forms using adobe form services through BTP, and we require to read header text/item text from freight order/billing document. But we are unable to identify any released CDS view to be consumed, and we are not able to use 'READ_TEXT' functionality.

Kindly provide us with feasible solution to get the values from header and item text.

Thanks,

Priya

entry.title: Re: Troubles connecting to HANA Cloud from BAS
entry.content:
Please find below few general troubleshooting steps you can try:

- Ensure that your local server can reach the HANA DB server. You can do this by pinging the server's IP address or hostname.
- Double-check the username and password you're using to connect to the HANA DB. Make sure they are correct and have the necessary permissions to access the database.
- The connection string is the line of code that specifies the location of your database. Make sure it's correct and properly formatted.
- If you're using a JDBC or ODBC driver to connect to the HANA DB, make sure it's up to date.
- If your local server or the HANA DB server is behind a firewall, it could be blocking the connection. You may need to adjust your firewall settings to allow the connection.
- If none of the above steps work, check the server logs for any error messages. These can provide more information about what's going wrong.

entry.title: Re: HANA Stored Procedure - Dynamically assign column nam...
entry.content: As I know, in HANA SQLScript, you cannot directly use a variable to represent a column name in a SELECT statement.

entry.title: Transport integration with Cloud ALM possibilities for SAP Integration suite
entry.content:
Need to understand the possibility of integrating CTMS for integration suite with CLOUD ALM.

How this can be achieved?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Transport integration with Cloud ALM possibilities fo...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

The blog Interplay of SAP Cloud ALM and SAP Cloud Transport Management Service takes you through Cloud Integration as part of the SAP Integration Suite

The blog provides information on how to utilize SAP Cloud Transport Management service in conjunction with SAP Cloud ALM. The chosen example for SAP Integration Suite - Cloud Integration provides a first insight how change and deployment management in SAP Cloud ALM improves your traceability and helps you keeping track of your integration scenarios. 

KBA 3358694 - Integration between SAP Cloud ALM Deployment and SAP Cloud Transport Management service, provides additional links with this information. 

Best Regards, 
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAC Data Modeling: Combine Data and map to unassigned
entry.content: HI @William_Yu,

entry.title: Re: SF - How to consider several time entries individually with the same time type per day
entry.content: Are the time slots always the same for the Official Erranc? Did you check if the grace rule rounding feature can help? https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/successfactors-time-management-new-features-in-h2-2022/ba-p/13545019. thats currently the only option. If this does not work than there is currently no option. You would need to create an enhancement request.

entry.title: Unable to generate print preview for custom BTP adobe form through RAP model
entry.content:
Hi,

We trying to implement custom forms using BTP Adobe form services by developing RAP application. We are trying to include print preview or download functionality for the pdf custom adobe forms but we are not able to view the form in the Fiori front end. The generated form is going to print queue but we are not able to view the form from there directly.

Kindly provide us with solution for the mentioned issues.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SF - How to consider several time entries individually with the same time type per day
entry.content: No they can vary every time the time type is registered. Thank you for looking into it.

entry.title: Re: Solution Order - Subscription BAdI Extensibility
entry.content:
Dear Kankgkana,

We are trying to implement the CRMS4_SOLO_ORC_SB_SUBSC_MODIFY to create 2 custom references on subscription item level also thanks to the instructions contained in this blog but we're encountering some challenges.

In Subscription Billing I created reference types Customer_group_2 and Customer_group_3.
The values for these custom references should be read from a CDS view available in S4 (so not from a custom field in the solution order as in your example).

In attachment, you can see a screenshot of our code.

The issue we have is that with this code, the badi creates the custom references on subscription header level, and not on item level as we want.
We're not sure what's wrong since our code is quite similar to yours.

Can you please advise on what we should change?

Thank you very much in advance.

entry.title: Re: Adding Additional Fields in Decision Table of BRF+ Ap...
entry.content: If its a custom field, shouldn't you be expose this field via Custom Fields(CFL) app instead of this CDS view extension?

entry.title: Re: How to post Deferred Expenses without Purchase Order...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please refer to fiori app Create Incoming Invoices.. This app prermits to post supplier invoice without purchase order. Give the  GL account (Deferral Account in your case) on line item and post the accounting docuemnt to pay vendor immediately as per your payment terms.

entry.title: Adding the Logo in the SAP BTP Adobe Form in S/4 public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team,

While creating a custom adobe form using RAP Model approach, we are unable to pass the logos or any images in the Adobe form. We tried by adding the image in the Adobe Life Cycle Designer (ADLC) and uploaded through the template store in BTP, but we were unable to get the logo through this approach.

Kindly provide us a solution to add logos in the Custom BTP Adobe Forms.

 

Thanks,

Swarup

entry.title: Re: SF - How to consider several time entries individuall...
entry.content:
A workaround could be to create 2 different time types: one for the morning Errand, one for the afternoon Errand. And both fill a different time type group. You can then cut deduct 30 minutes out of this time type groups.

best regards

Volker

entry.title: Re: SAC Data Modeling: Combine Data and map to unassigned
entry.content: Hi @William_Yu, To point one I meant the main chapter: "Importing and Preparing Transaction Data in a Model" and then in the subchapter: "Map to target" in the link: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/design-data-models-and-transform-data-in-sap-analytics-cloud/importing-and-wrangling-transactional-data-in-a-model_ef525316-3e9b-4f7e-8108-c3131bfdaf2e And there is the question of how I can set something too unassigned. To point 2) It's sad that it doesn't work with the current model version. In the Classic model I still have this function, it is better to use the classic model version until this feature is there or to merge CDS View in the CDS Views and then bring it into the SAC. Regards Niels

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 TB report BP display filtered by GL Accounts
entry.content: You can use SAP Query (SQ01) to create a custom report. Define the data source (BSEG, BKPF, SKB1, SKAT), create the query with filters for company code, posting date, business partner, and control account, design the layout, and implement the logic to calculate balances

entry.title: Re: SF - How to consider several time entries individually with the same time type per day
entry.content: A workaround solution could be to create 2 different time types: one for the morning Errand, one for the afternoon Errand. Both fill 2 different time type groups and you can then deduct 30 minutes in each time type group by a normal aggregate input group and split

entry.title: I have 1 client using ECC6 EHP6; he is forced to implement pacs.008 which is replacing MT103;
entry.content:
Hello,

I have 1 client using ECC6 EHP6; he is forced to implement pacs.008 which is replacing MT103 according to the law;Will this be a Z t-code it it can be a standard transaction and how shall we proceed? Thanks in advance for your answer.

Regards

G.Tatayah

entry.title: SAP HANA : Performance assessment over monitor view M_MEMORY_OBJECT_DISPOSITIONS_
entry.content:
Dear all

Today we have a performance problem in our production system. The monitor view M_MEMORY_OBJECT_DISPOSITIONS_ is taking around 20 sec to be consulted. Whereas in acceptance it takes around 3 seconds for the same ammount of rows (prod = 240 rows , acc = 236 rows)

select count(1) FROM SYS.M_MEMORY_OBJECT_DISPOSITIONS_

PRODUCTION (20 sec)

ACCEPTANCE (3 sec)

The question I have is , how can I analyse where the statement is spending most of the time. This will definitely lead us to the root cause of the performance.

Thank you in advance for all your support.

entry.title: Sample Code
entry.content:
hi

  How to create connection to Hana Database using c# and create button in A/r Invoice

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Dropdowns For actions within RAP and Fiori Elements
entry.content:
So, we have found a solution. Path for actions should be like: 

"DataFieldForAction::then take a full action path from localService->metadata.xml and replace ( with :: 
It will look like: 
 
"DataFieldForAction::com.sap.gateway.srvd.zal_sd_hierarchy_empl.v0001.approve::com.sap.gateway.srvd.zal_sd_hierarchy_empl.v0001.EMPLOYEE_HRType"

entry.content: Hi Igor, I am having the same issue - did you mange to fix it?

entry.title: Re: CDS Views: return most recent record
entry.content:
This type of thing?

Delete duplicate entries in ABAP CDS views using T... - SAP Community

entry.title: SAP & AGILITA Workshop on SAP Build: what a great experience!
entry.content:
At the end of last week I had a very stimulating trip to Berlin, where I participated in the SAP & AGILITA Workshop on SAP Build. It was an interesting event and I'm happy to share my takeaways with you.

Thursday November 27, 8:30 AM: I join my colleagues who arrived from Walldorf and Helsinki for a breakfast at our hotel, and we quickly head up to SAP Berlin office. Once there, together with the Berlin colleagues, we set up the event rooms we had booked for the keynote and then the hands-on workshop.

At 10.30, attendees start to arrive: we have the pleasure to welcome business users and developers from Berliner Verkehrsbetriebe (BVG), Bundesdruckerei, Stiftung Das Rauhe Haus, Hochschule für Technik und Wirtschaft Berlin as well as partners and a few SAP employees. All together, we engage discussions over a buffet of snacks before the event kicks off at 11.00 with our keynote, joined by many attendees on LinkedIn live and moderated by Esmeé.

Keynote and solution deep dive

Diana Roesner starts the keynote by introducing the Clean Core concept and explaining how SAP Build can be used to easily create side-by-side extensions to an SAP application. On this very important topic, I highly recommend you a new white paper - “Clean core extensibility for SAP S/4HANA Cloud” - and a crisp and easy-to consume learning journey - “Practicing Clean Core Extensibility For SAP S/4HANA Cloud”.

We then dive into the different components of the SAP Build solution, with my close colleagues Kanishka presenting SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Build Code, and Yumnah describing SAP Build Apps and SAP Build Work Zone. Jesse gives a great demo of how SAP Build can help 🎅🏻 Santa Company 🎄 streamline order approvals by creating an extension directly from his SAP S/4HANA ERP using our Extensibility Wizard. Finally Hemant provides an insightful perspective on how SAP Build supports line-of-businesses, including finance, procurement, supply chain, customer experience, human resources, IT and cross-functional:

Following the presentations, our experts held a Q&A session with the audience, answering the questions raised on-site as well as in the online chat:

We received very positive feedback from the audience on this session, which you can watch as a replay.

You can also download the slides of this keynote.

Hands-on Workshop

After a short break, we moved to another room for the hands-on workshop. In 3 hours, our local participants had the opportunity to create a full-stack application to improve customer loyalty. The purpose of the application is to allow customers to redeem points from their purchases. To do this, the application needs to access customer, purchase and product data from SAP S/4HANA.

Specifically, workshop participants experienced using SAP Build Code to create a back-end CAP service with Joule AI copilot, highlighting SAP's generative AI power for development. The customer loyalty application is connected to SAP S/4HANA Cloud as an extension to the ERP, so the participants learned how to use a BTP destination. And they used SAP Build Apps to create a mobile app, showcasing our modern low-code/no-code development tool.

This is the part of the event I was involved in, and I have to say it was great and rewarding to see our participants amazed at how Joule helped them create data entities, sample data and JavaScript code from simple prompts.  They really experienced the power of Generative AI that we showcased at SAP TechEd a few weeks ago!

If you would like to do this hands-on exercise and experience Joule by yourself, it’s very easy!

Indeed, it is available here in our Basic Trial environment, where you will have immediate access to all the tools needed: SAP Build Code - Generative AI-powered development with Joule copilot.

Christmas Market at AGILITA’s

At 16:00 we jumped into a bus who drove us to the AGILITA office in Berlin. There, AGILITA Christmas Market brought everyone together to reflect and share ideas in a festive atmosphere.

Thomas Neuhaus, Head of Digital Experience for AGILITA, presented SAP AppHaus Workshops: SAP and AGILITA are helping customers find the right path to digitalization with design and architecture thinking workshops. Customers discover how to integrate Al and innovation for their own use cases, and how to effectively improve their business processes.

We also had the opportunity to attend very interesting demos of applications developed by the AGILITA team with SAP Build, showing how tasks like recording time or logging work can happen in just 3 clicks:  

AGIL AI.TimeManager  - Optimize your time and activity recording with AGIL Time Manager, the flexible and user- friendly solution for efficient time management and seamless integration in real-time. More on AGIL AI.TimeManager in SAP Store.

 

AGIL Al.Sales  - Boost sales performance with the power of voice and Al synergy. Effortlessly dictate orders and meeting notes while on the go - advanced generative Al transcribes, analyzes, and seamlessly updates your systems in real time.  More on AGIL AI.Sales in SAP Store

 Discover more AGILITA’s applications and extensions in SAP Store.

Up to you now!

You too can take advantage of the content we have prepared for this event. And it's very simple!

  1. Watch the keynote replay 🎞  ️
  2. Download the presentation 👍🏻  
  3. Do the hands-on exercise

 

Personal note

To end this blog post on a more personal note, I would like to say that I had 2 very energizing days in Berlin. I only work 3 days a week, Monday-Wednesday, but when I was asked if I could attend this event in Berlin on a Thursday, I didn't hesitate for a second: as I work 100% from home in Lyon, it was a great opportunity to meet up with colleagues from Berlin and Walldorf. The day after the event, we took time to reflect on what we did in 2024 and what we would like to do in 2025. This trip to Berlin was also a nice opportunity to meet great people from our valued partner AGILITA.

And when I was on my way back to Lyon on Friday evening, what caught my eye in the Berlin airport terminal?

On a big screen, an ad from SAP promoting our magical trifecta of Process + Data + AI 😊

entry.title: Enumerations and typed dimensions in SAP DM stack 2200
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

In SAP Disclosure Management stack 2200 is now possible to manage enumerations and typed dimensions according to ESRS regulation. It is quite easy to understand how to manage in SAP DM, but I would like to know if there is any how to or manual to understand how to build the taxonomy in Taxonomy Editor. I try to replicate the sample taxonomy in the EFRAG website(https://www.efrag.org/en/projects/esrs-xbrl-taxonomy/concluded) but I cannot be able to unlock enumerations and typed dimensions in SAP DM:

and

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

Andrea Migliore

entry.title: Re: Budget Controlling Not working in Recurring Journal E...
entry.content:
Hi Phoo,

In CBC configuration -  Maintain Budget Availability Control Profile for Cost Centers, please check your cost center budget profile. Ensure that in the budget profile, Account Groups node, all your GL accounts listed in Recurring Entry Temlatea are also maintained in the account group for your Budget Profile.

Also ensure in tye Tolerance Limit node, please select " All Activity Types" in the same configuration. This should resolve the issue.

entry.title: Re: How to mass upload batch derivation condition records in S/4 Public cloud
entry.content: I am facing same, It will be helpful if somebody can share their knowledge here regarding same

entry.title: AL11 pathway source
entry.content:
Apart from debugging, from a posted invoice,is there another way from tables how can we figure out the AL11 pathway for the path of the invoices processed?

Thank you in advance for your comments,

Regards

G.Tatayah

entry.title: Re: SF - How to consider several time entries individuall...
entry.content: Hi Volker - Thank you very much for your input and time. Very much appreciated! We will work with the suggested workaround.

entry.title: Re: EPMDimensionOverrideRange
entry.content: The first issue is you are attempting to reference the table rather than the column 2 which contains the BAS(*) - I tried this and it crashed. The second problem seems to be that EPMDimensionOverrideRange requires a rang, not table. Change the first parameter to G2:G3 and it should work (also technically the second parameter is supposed to be a range rather than PROFITCENTRE - but it does work both ways)

entry.title: Creation Custom references in Subscription item via Badi from Solution Order
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are trying to implement the CRMS4_SOLO_ORC_SB_SUBSC_MODIFY to create 2 custom references on subscription item level when the subscription is created from a Solution order.

One of the helping sources we used is this blog : https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/solution-order-subscription-badi-extensibility/bc-p/13954073#M177429. 

In Subscription Billing I created reference types Customer_group_2 and Customer_group_3.
The values for these custom references should be read from a CDS view available in S4 (so not from a custom field in the solution order as in the example described in the blog).

In attachment, you can see a screenshot of our code.

The issue we have is that with this code, the badi creates the custom references on subscription header level, and not on item level as we want.
We're not sure what's wrong since our code is quite similar to the one shown in the blog under sentence "In the following screenshot, you can see how to fill the data using the BAdI for the subscription item custom references field. "
We also tried to modify the path in line "INTO TABLE" to select the correct "subscrpnbillgcstmref" under "ITEMS" but this seems to not be possible as the system expects an object after subscrpnbillgsubscription_out - this would mean that we have to create an new object that would lead to the custom reference on item level.

This step is not described for similar scenarios in the blog nor in other sources on the topic so we're wondering if our assumption of creating the object is correct of it there is a better way / different code we should use.

Can you please advise ?

Thank you very much in advance.

entry.title: Re: How to use company currency for supplement budget pro...
entry.content:
Hi May,

In your configuration please check in-  Maintain Budget Availability Control Profile for Projects.

Check your budget profile, what is the currency type that is maintained. If THB is your controllong currency then please maintain Global Currency in the configuraton for your Budget Profile.

entry.title: Re: Adopting General Display Name
entry.content:
Hi @HarveyXu ,

I am getting back to the following reply of yours:

"If not enable EC and you use OData API, general display name is exposed in User OData API as displayName. You can refer to https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PLATFORM/d599f15995d348a1b45ba5603e2aba9b/e13d5de2c3844... for detail. "

I agree that the displayName is exposed in the OData API, but the point is, that the standard integration between SAP HCM and SF does not consider it and does not offer it as part of the standard fields of the integration. My expectation would be that SAP delivers an enhancement to this integration and includes the displayName or an enhancement that triggers the calculation of the displayName when user records are updated via API.

Thanks and regards
Sebastian
